overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} B _ {n} = \frac {4 V _ {s}}{\pi} \left[ \int_ {0} ^ {\alpha_ {1}} \sin n \omega t d (\omega t) - \int_ {\alpha_ {1}} ^ {\alpha_ {2}} \sin n \omega t d (\omega t) + \int_ {\alpha_ {2}} ^ {\pi / 2} \sin n \omega t d (\omega t) \right] \\ = \frac {4 V _ {s}}{\pi} \frac {1 - 2 \cos n \alpha_ {1} + 2 \cos n \alpha_ {2}}{n} \end{array} \tag {6}\tag{6.92}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text {For 0\leq\omega t <   \pi / 3 :} & I _ {a b} = 0 \\ & i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = - I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ \text {For \pi / 3 <   \omega t <   2\pi / 3 :} & i _ {a b} = i _ {c a} = i _ {a} = 0 \\ \text {For 2\pi / 3 <   \omega t <   \pi :} & i _ {a b} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \\ & i _ {c a} = 0 \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \\ \text {For \pi <   \omega t <   4\pi / 3 :} & i _ {a b} = 0 \\ & i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = - I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ \text {For 4\pi / 3 <   \omega t <   5\pi / 3 :} & i _ {a b} = i _ {c a} = i _ {a} = 0 \\ \text {For 5\pi / 3 <   \omega t <   2\pi :} & i _ {a b} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \\ & i _ {c a} = 0 \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \text {For } 0\leq\omega t < \pi / 3 : & I _ {a b} = 0 \\ & i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = - I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ \text {For } \pi / 3 < \omega t < 2\pi / 3 : & i _ {a b} = i _ {c a} = i _ {a} = 0 \\ \text {For } 2\pi / 3 < \omega t < \pi : & i _ {a b} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \\ & i _ {c a} = 0 \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \\ \text {For } \pi < \omega t < 4\pi / 3 : & i _ {a b} = 0 \\ & i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = - I _ {m} \sin (\omega t - 4 \pi / 3) \\ \text {For } 4\pi / 3 < \omega t < 5\pi / 3 : & i _ {a b} = i _ {c a} = i _ {a} = 0 \\ \text {For } 5\pi / 3 < \omega t < 2\pi : & i _ {a b} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \\ & i _ {c a} = 0 \\ & i _ {a} = i _ {a b} - i _ {c a} = I _ {m} \sin \omega t \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} B _ {n} = \frac {4 V _ {s}}{n \pi} \left[ \int_ {\alpha_ {1}} ^ {\alpha_ {2}} \sin (n \omega t) d (\omega t) + \int_ {\alpha_ {3}} ^ {\alpha_ {4}} \sin (n \omega t) d (\omega t) + \int_ {\alpha_ {5}} ^ {\alpha_ {6}} \sin (n \omega t) d (\omega t) \right. \\ \left. + \int_ {\pi / 3} ^ {\pi / 2} \sin (n \omega t) d (\omega t) \right] \\ B _ {n} = \frac {4 V _ {s}}{n \pi} \left[ \frac {1}{2} - \sum_ {k = 1} ^ {m} (- 1) ^ {k} \cos (n \alpha_ {k}) \right] \text {for} n = 1, 3, 5, \dots \end{array} \tag {6.9}\tag{6.97}
